nav.aboutDescription: Gestión automatizada de capacidad de bibliotecas multimedia — puntúa, clasifica y limpia tus bibliotecas *arr.
login.title: Bienvenido de vuelta
login.subtitle: Inicia sesión en Capacitarr
login.branding: Capacitarr — Gestión Inteligente de Capacidad Multimedia
login.networkError: Error de red al conectar con el backend
dashboard.title: [ES] Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: [ES] Capacity overview across your media storage.
dashboard.diskGroups: [ES] {count} disk group mapped | [ES] {count} disk groups mapped
dashboard.noDiskGroupsHelp: [ES] Add integrations in Settings and data will appear on the next poll cycle.
dashboard.engineRunningDetail: [ES] Engine is running — evaluating media items…
audit.title: [ES] Audit History
audit.subtitle: [ES] Historical log of all scoring engine decisions and space reclaimed.
rules.title: [ES] Scoring Engine
rules.subtitle: [ES] Adjust preference weights and set custom rules.
rules.diskThresholdsDesc: [ES] Set when cleanup begins (threshold) and when it stops (target) for each disk.
rules.cleanupThresholdDesc: [ES] Begin cleanup when usage exceeds this %
rules.cleanupTargetDesc: [ES] Stop cleanup when usage drops to this %
rules.preferenceWeightsDesc: [ES] Higher weights increase the attribute's influence on deletion score.
rules.customRulesDesc: [ES] Rules take effect on the next engine run, not immediately. When multiple rules match an item, their effects multiply together. "Always keep" is an absolute override and cannot be outweighed by any other rule.
rules.noRules: [ES] No rules configured. Media will be ranked purely by preference weights.
rules.deletionPriorityDesc: [ES] Items ranked by deletion priority. Only enough items are removed to reach the target disk threshold.
rules.diskBelowThreshold: [ES] Disk usage is below threshold. No items would be removed.
rules.noItemsToEvaluate: [ES] No items to evaluate. Connect integrations and ensure media exists.
rules.orderDisclaimer: [ES] Rule order is for your organization only — all rules are evaluated regardless of position.
settings.title: [ES] Settings
settings.subtitle: [ES] Manage integrations, general preferences, and authentication.
settings.displayDesc: [ES] Timezone and clock format preferences (saved locally)
settings.themeHint: [ES] Changes apply immediately and are stored in your browser.
settings.engineBehaviorDesc: [ES] Control how the scoring engine acts on results
settings.scoreTiebreakerDesc: [ES] When items have the same score, how should they be ordered?
settings.noIntegrationsHelp: [ES] Connect your Plex, Sonarr, Radarr, or Tautulli instances to get started.
settings.changeUsernameDesc: [ES] Update your admin username for better security
settings.deletionSafetyDesc: [ES] Control whether Capacitarr can permanently delete media files
settings.deletionSafetyExplain: [ES] When enabled, Capacitarr will permanently delete media files from your storage when the scoring engine flags items for removal. Files cannot be recovered.
settings.deletionsActive: [ES] Flagged items will be permanently removed
settings.deletionsActiveAlertDesc: [ES] Media flagged by the scoring engine will be permanently deleted from disk. Disable this setting to return to simulation mode.
settings.pollIntervalDesc: [ES] How often Capacitarr checks your integrations
settings.pollIntervalHint: [ES] The poller adjusts dynamically — no restart required.
settings.retentionWarning: [ES] Indefinite retention will cause the database to grow continuously. This may eventually impact performance.
settings.clearDataDesc: [ES] Removes all audit logs, capacity history, engine stats, and disk groups. Integrations, rules, and preferences are preserved.
engine.autoModeWarning: [ES] Auto mode will automatically delete media items that exceed the threshold. This action cannot be undone. Are you sure?
help.title: [ES] Help
help.subtitle: [ES] Learn how Capacitarr works and how to configure it effectively.
